nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 粉頭果鳩
nodes.summary: 粉頭果鳩（Jambu fruit dove，学名 Ramphiculus jambu），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于次生林，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits mangrove swamps and lowland rain forests up to and is also found in secondary woodland.{{ cite book | last1=Baptista | first1=L.F

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits mangrove swamps and lowland rain forests up to and is also found in secondary woodland.{{ cite book | last1=Baptista | first1=L.F

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Extensive deforestation in Indonesia and Malaysia means that this dove is now threatened, although its ability to live in second growth and at higher elevation means that its situation is not as critical as that of some forest bird species

links.label: 属于
